basic_details.job_title: BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Birla Institute of Technology & Science Pilani (BITS Pilani)
basic_details.short_information: Birla Institute of Technology & Science Pilani (BITS Pilani) Institute Research Fellow Notification 2026 has been released on 26 May 2026 on the official website bits-pilani.ac.in. Has been announced through the BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: MSc/ MTech in Chemistry/ Polymer Science/ Polymer technology/ Material Science or B. Tech/ M.Tech in polymer engineering/ polymer technology.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BITS Pilani to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow position is 25th June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Institute Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Institute Research Fellow position will receive a monthly stipend of Rs. 37,000. This is a contractual role.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an MSc/MTech in Chemistry/Polymer Science/Polymer Technology/Material Science or a B.Tech/M.Tech in polymer engineering/polymer technology to be eligible for this post.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q5. How will candidates be selected for the Institute Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Institute Research Fellow position involves two main stages: shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an online or offline interview.

faq.question: Q6. What is the job type for this BITS Pilani recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment for the Institute Research Fellow post at BITS Pilani is on a contractual basis. This means the employment is for a fixed term as per the project requirements.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section of this article. It contains all the detailed information regarding the recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. Can I apply offline for this position?
faq.answer: No, the application mode for the BITS Pilani Institute Research Fellow recruitment is strictly online. Candidates must submit their applications through the official BITS Pilani website.

faq.question: Q9. Which campus of BITS Pilani is this recruitment for?
faq.answer: This recruitment is for the BITS Pilani Goa campus. The official website link provided in the Important Links section directs to the Goa campus page.
